title: Top-spring Sink Mat, 2Pcs Kitchen Sink Protector Mat for Ceramic/Stainless Steel Sinks, Cut to Size Draining Mat 30 x 40cm (Clear)
features: 【Protect Your Sink】- Keep your sink looking clean and scratch-free with our sink protector mat.
【Designed for Ceramic Sinks】Specifically designed to fit ceramic sinks, our sink mats provide a perfect fit and maximum protection.
【Fits Stainless Steel Sinks】Our sink protector mats are also suitable for stainless steel sinks, providing versatile protection.
【Durable & Easy to Clean】Made from high-quality plastic materials, this sink protector mats are built to last and easy to clean, simply rinse or wipe clean.
【Customizable Drain Covers】Our plastic drain covers can be easily cut to size, ensuring a perfect fit for your sink.
description: Product Description Top-spring Kitchen Sink Mat Our high-quality plastic sink mat, perfect for protecting and preserving the longevity of your kitchen sink. Measuring 30x40 cm, this versatile sink mat is designed to fit most sinks, including ceramic and stainless steel. With its versatile functionality, our sink mat can also be used as a kitchen sink liner or a kitchen drainer mat. It is perfect for protecting your sink from any stains, scratches, or general wear and tear that can be caused by everyday use. Adjustable We understand the importance of customization, which is why our plastic sink mats are cut-to-size. This means you can easily adjust the mat to fit your specific sink shape and size, providing a snug and secure fit. Easy to Clean The sink protector mat acts as a barrier between your dishes and the sink, preventing scratches and damage. It is specially crafted to withstand daily use, made from durable plastic that is easy to clean and maintain. Protect Your Sink Not only does our sink mat protect your sink, but it also doubles as a drainer mat. Its unique design allows water to flow freely. This makes it the perfect accessory for sink, ensuring your dishes and utensils dry properly. A Valuable Addition to Your Kitchen Accessories Available in a range of attractive colours and designs, our sink mat is not only practical but also adds a stylish touch to your kitchen. Whether you have a ceramic sink or a stainless steel sink, our sink protector mat is designed to cater to your specific needs and keep your sink and countertop in pristine condition. NOTICE: 1.Please wash it immediately after it got stained by sauce or jam. 2.Please do not put it into boiling hot water or under hot pans. 3.If the sink mat is not flat when you receive it, please soak it in warm water and it will become flat. 4.If you feel a little smell of PVC material, it is normal, please feel free to use. 2Pcs Sink Mat 2Pcs Sink Mat 2Pcs Sink Mat 2Pcs Sink Mat 2Pcs Sink Mat 2Pcs Sink Mat Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 245 4.4 out of 5 stars 430 4.1 out of 5 stars 214 4.1 out of 5 stars 245 4.1 out of 5 stars 245 4.4 out of 5 stars 122 Price £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £11.99 £ 11 . 99 Colour Clear Black Clear Black Grey Black Translucent Material Plastic Plastic Plastic Plastic Plastic Plastic Size 40 x 30 cm 40 x 30 cm 40 x 30 cm 40 x 30 cm 40 x 30 cm 40 x 30 cm Usage Scenarios Kitchen, sink, tableware Kitchen, sink, tableware Kitchen, sink, tableware Kitchen, sink, tableware Kitchen, sink, tableware Kitchen, sink, tableware
